base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of zero — a character (boss) from 1993 mega man x. Zero — red-armor Maverick Hunter. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Zero — red-armor Maverick Hunter; Z-Saber + Z-Buster. NPC in MMX1, playable in MMX2+
